title: conversion of string '0   ' to type smallint or integer fails
bug_features_seed: INSERT INTO SMALLINT_TEST(f1) VALUES (CAST('   42   ' AS UNSIGNED));
INSERT INTO INTEGER_TEST(f1) VALUES (CAST('   9999   ' AS SIGNED));
INSERT INTO INTEGER_TEST(f1) VALUES (CAST('   -1   ' AS SIGNED));
key_bug_features: Inserting padded strings into smallint or integer fails
